comments.author: @danavaneyck588
comments.text: There is a movie by Ron Howard called Eden (2024), which follows three very different groups of settlers who relocate to the uninhabited, remote Floreana Island in the Galápagos to build a utopian society. It failed.

replies.author: @reallifeincountries
replies.text: That movie recommendation is spot on! 🎬 The Floreana Island affair is one of the most bizarre and dark chapters in survival history. Why do you think almost every real-world attempt to build an isolated 'utopian' society ends in total collapse?
